creator: vosinnii
testProcedure:
• Setup the Standard Environment Neonatal as shown in chapter 2.2
• Set the test lung to C = 2 ml/mBar, Rp = 50
• If not already done, activate TI/Pause-philosophy in Configuration/Modes
• In Configuration/Setups select “Use factory settings” for Neonatal 1,2 and 3.
• Set Patient group to Neonatal and weight to 2.0 kg.
• Select Ventilation Mode PCV+
• Start the ventilation
testRequirements:

XXX		 +-10 ms 5 ≤ 100
25 > 100

P-ramp is limited by 1/3 of TI. Adjustment of TI can override P-ramp.

 

Limitation in SIMV, VS, ASV, SPONT, NIV, NIV-ST, nCPAP-PS, nCPAP-PC mode: max. 200ms

HAMILTON-C1/T1/MR1/C3 (Adult/Ped/Neo) and HAMILTON-C6 (Neo):

·          <50ms: Pressure overshoots up to max. 3mbar acceptable

·          ≤100ms: Pressure overshoots up to max. 2mbar acceptable

·          >100ms: within tolerance range
